description: Went looking for reported Herring Gull. Found this instead. Yellow legs and feet, dark back, red gonys. A bit larger than adjacent RBGUs and similar in size to 3 CAGU nearby. Asked Tony Leukering for advice because everything fit LBBG except the head color - not dark around eye with minimal streaking on head and neck. He mentioned it could be entering pre-alternate molt. May be first county record, hence this report.
photographer: Photographer: Jason St. Pierre, Jason St. Pierre
